name: Incorrect Conversion between Numeric Types
description: When converting from one numeric data type to another, data can be omitted or translated in a way that produces unexpected values. If the resulting values are used in a sensitive context such as memory allocation or access control, dangerous behaviors may occur.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[type_conversion] node converts numeric data between incompatible types (e.g., long to int, signed to unsigned) flowing into CONTROL[security_decision] or TRANSFORM[allocate] without CONTROL[range_check] validating the conversion result
